name: Maven自动部署war包至Tomcat
body:
#插件说明与配置
具体细节可以查看参考资料进行推敲。  
1. tomcat-maven-plugin插件已经从groupId的org.codehaus.mojo转至org.apache.tomcat.maven;  
2. pom.xml配置： 
```javascript
    <plugin>
       <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId>
       <artifactId>tomcat6-maven-plugin</artifactId>
       <version>2.2</version>
       <configuration>
       <url>http://localhost:8080/manager</url>
       <uriEncoding>UTF-8</uriEncoding>
       <server>demoServer</server>
       <!-- <username>demo</username> <password>demo</password> -->
       <update>true</update>
       <!-- application path always starts with / -->
       <path>/${finalName}</path>
       </configuration>			
    </plugin>
```
其中project的<properties>节点下配置`<finalName>${project.artifactId}</finalName>`
##
###参考资料
1. [How to Deploy Maven WAR Project in Tomcat Automatically](http://www.journaldev.com/4738/how-to-deploy-maven-war-project-in-tomcat-automatically) 
2. [使用Maven自动部署Java Web项目到Tomcat问题小记](http://blog.csdn.net/lanxuezaipiao/article/details/40356991)
3. [Maven入门示例(3)：自动部署至外部Tomcat](http://www.cnblogs.com/yuandingjiema/archive/2012/12/23/2829818.html)
